isolation.boundary: Local repo and local services only; no production logic modified.

assertions.title: 30-day average, stddev, and bounds computed correctly

steps.action: Run targeted vitest suite for baselines computation tests
steps.expected: Known-value avg/stddev and upper/lower tests pass, including zero-variance case
steps.observed: Passed: "computes correct avg_30d and stddev_30d for 30 known values", "computes upper = avg + stddev and lower = avg - stddev", and "handles zero stddev when all values are identical"

assertions.title: Minimum 7 data points required for baseline

steps.action: Run baseline threshold tests in targeted vitest suite
steps.observed: Passed: "skips metrics with fewer than 7 data points" and "includes metrics with exactly 7 data points"

steps.action: Run on-demand baseline window boundary test
steps.expected: Window [D-30, D-1] used; reference date D excluded
steps.observed: Passed: "queries 30-day window [D-30, D-1] excluding reference date"

steps.action: Run summary metric delta computation tests
steps.expected: Normal case delta/delta_pct and avg=0 edge case behave without Infinity/NaN
steps.observed: Passed: "computes delta and delta_pct for normal case (value=72, avg=61)" and "returns delta_pct = 0 when avg_30d is 0"

steps.action: Run baseline and summary negative-value tests
steps.expected: Negative values/averages produce correct avg/stddev/delta/z-safe calculations and correct delta_pct sign handling
steps.observed: Passed: "computes correct avg and stddev for negative values", "handles negative values correctly (body_temperature_deviation = -0.3)", and "handles negative avg correctly for delta_pct (uses absolute avg)"

frictions.description: Initial direct binary path (/Users/weae1504/Projects/totus/apps/web/node_modules/.bin/vitest) was unavailable due workspace dependency layout.
frictions.resolution: Used npm --prefix ... run test -- <targeted files> to invoke vitest successfully.
